prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-ASRO-FIXEDSLUICE-27INCH Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 27" Compact Aluminum Sluice Box with Flared Mouth Gold Prospecting Equipment Description: Increase your gold recovery rate, while reducing river side set up time and effort with the ASR Outdoor Compact 27 Inch Fixed Aluminum Sluice Box.

With a uniquely designed flared mouth opening, the structure of this gold sluice box will allow for more water capacity suspension to flow through the entire channel of the sluice box, without any extra tools, components or time required on the prospector's end. This compact aluminum sluice box comes pre-assembled and ready to use right out of the box, saving you time and effort during claim site set up.

In addition to more water flow via the flared channel opening, this sluice box also comes with essential preinstalled material layers to help trap gold: First is the rubber matting in the top third of the sluice box, followed by carpet, miners moss, angled aluminum mesh and large 18 gauge zinc plated steel riffles that make up the last two thirds. These layers work in concurrence to help ease the flow of water, allowing heavier materials like gold to drop, while continuing to carry out lighter materials to the end of the sluice box.

Another great feature of this gold sluice box is the portability. Weighing in at just 4.80lbs, this gold sluice box is compact and lightweight, making it easy to trek your claim site. It also features a built in shoulder strap that can be attached or removed via included carabiners; carry the sluice over your shoulder or toss it in a five gallon bucket with other prospecting tools.

This 27 inch sluice box is designed to used and made to be portable. Aluminum body and angled mesh, as well as 18 gauge zinc plated steel riffles are rust resistant and ensure the quality and longevity of this gold sluice box will withstand many gold prospecting seasons ahead. Now, go get this sluice box level and you'll be gold rush ready. Good luck. Search Terms: gold prospecting high banker aluminum riffle sluice box mining supplies classifier tools Features: - HIGH YIELD GOLD RECOVERY: This ASR Outdoor compact gold sluice box enhances water capacity suspension through the entire channel of the sluice box, via a uniquely designed flared mouth gate - GOLD RUSH READY: Preassembled and ready to go right out of the box, this lightweight aluminum sluice box measures 27 inches and features four layers of gold trapping material: carpet, miners moss, expanded aluminum angled mesh and large 18 gauge steel zinc plated riffles - PORTABLE DESIGN: Weighing in at just 4.80lbs, this gold sluice box is lightweight and easy to carry with the built in removable shoulder strap (attaches with included carabiners) - RUST RESISTANT: Aluminum body and angled mesh, as well as 18 gauge zinc plated steel riffles ensure the quality and longevity of this gold sluice box will withstand many gold prospecting seasons ahead - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 27 x 10.75 x 2.5 inches; Sluice Box Weight: 4.80lbs; Channel Width: 9.25 inches; Flare Width: 10.75 inches; Material: Aluminum === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 27" Compact Aluminum Sluice Box Gold Prospecting

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 27-in Compact Aluminum Sluice Box

anthropic.title_differentiation: Flared Mouth Design, Pre-Assembled, 480Lbs Lightweight, Rust Resistant, Removable Shoulder Strap, High Yield Gold Recovery

openai.title_differentiation: Flared Mouth For Higher Water Flow, Preassembled, 4 Layer Gold Trap, Removable Shoulder Strap, Rust Resistant
